introSection: L'll Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by the Allan Herschell Company previously located at Tinkertown Family Fun Park in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada.
fullText:
L'll Dipper was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by the Allan Herschell Company previously located at Tinkertown Family Fun Park in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada.



Unpainted track and supports.
